subcodes.first_line: We have, through the Most Exalted Pen, announced unto all the dwellers of the earth the glad-tidings of the Days of God. When the appointed time had come and the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اهل ارض را از قلم اعلی بایام الهی بشارت دادیم چون میقات رسید و جمال
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
